CREATE TABLE test_strings (haystack String, needle String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('hello world', 'o'), ('count substrings example', 'sub'), ('aaaaaa', 'aa'), ('aaaaa', 'aaa'), ('substring occurrences', 'occ');
SELECT countSubstrings(haystack, needle) FROM test_strings WHERE haystack LIKE '%example%';
SELECT countSubstrings(haystack, needle, 5) FROM test_strings WHERE needle = 'sub';
SELECT haystack, needle, countSubstrings(haystack, needle) AS occurrences FROM test_strings GROUP BY haystack, needle HAVING occurrences > 1;
SELECT countSubstrings(haystack, 'o') FROM (SELECT haystack FROM test_strings WHERE needle = 'o') AS sub_query;
SELECT SUM(countSubstrings(haystack, needle)) AS total_ocurrences FROM test_strings;
CREATE TABLE test_results (total UInt64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_results SELECT SUM(countSubstrings(haystack, needle)) FROM test_strings;
SELECT total FROM test_results WHERE total > 0;
SELECT countSubstrings('Ñandú es un ave', 'ñ') AS occurrences_case_insensitive USING countSubstringsCaseInsensitive('Ñandú es un ave', 'ñ');
SELECT countSubstringsCaseInsensitiveUTF8('Café está aquí', 'café') AS occurrences_utf8;
SELECT haystack, countSubstrings(haystack, needle) AS result FROM test_strings ORDER BY result DESC;
